content.thinking: I'm spotting a logical contradiction in the guard's statements—he claims the Warden returned from the northern watch alive, but then says the Warden fell three nights ago, which would mean dead. The elder also contradicts this by saying the Warden is alive and in good health. Beyond the inconsistency, the guard is also revealing information prematurely—that the Warden fell—which the elders haven't openly stated yet, breaking the spoiler constraint.
